nodes.title: The PM Group’s Full Service Advertising Agency Offerings are the Driving Force Behind Our Client Growth
A Conversation About Personal Safety and a Safer Path
The PM Group Raises Over A Million Dollars for Local Nonprofits in 2020

pageContext.content:
It was ‘Christmas in May’ as dozens of The PM Group and Noisy Trumpet staffers gathered to present a grand total of $226,792 to five amazing community non-profits that work tirelessly to make our community a better place.

 

 

Representatives from the Brighton Center, SA YES, the San Antonio Museum of Art and P.A.M Media Outreach all participated in the recent check presentations. The 100 Club and San Antonio Sports all received generous donations from the agency as well at separate presentations.

 

 

The PM Group has held multiple fundraising events during the first five months of 2021, while raising and donating over $311,000 total so far this year.

 

 

“Our companies have a legacy of community support and charitable giving through our ‘Volunteerism Matters’ employee program. I couldn’t be any prouder of our team for their dedicated commitment to making our community a better place,” stated Fran Yanity, President of both Noisy Trumpet and The PM Group and Board Member of numerous non-profit boards.

 

 

“Corporate support for 501c non-profits has been declining nationally for several years now. One of the few exceptions here in San Antonio would be the charitable giving from The PM Group and Noisy Trumpet,” stated SA YES Executive Director Danielle Gunter. “Their compassion for underprivileged school children has been on display for over 20 years now,” Gunter added.

 

 

Joining the PM Group and Noisy Trumpet team at the presentation were Tatiana Herrera-Schneider with San Antonio Museum of Art, Kim Jefferies and Katrina Campbell from Brighton Center, Paula Monroe with P.A.M. Media Outreach and Danielle Gunter with SA YES.

 

 

“As the San Antonio advertising and marketing agency leader, we have an obligation to help make our community a better place. We take great pride in our charitable giving and community support. I firmly believe that we owe much of our success to the kindness in our hearts that drives our giving culture,” said The PM Group’s CEO and Founder, Bob Wills.

 

 

In 2020, Wills spearheaded charitable fundraising at their companies and collectively raised over $1,076,000 for local non-profit groups benefitting organizations that serve and provide for military veterans, battered woman, childhood services, educational support and pet rescue. Just recently, The PM Group provided Christy’s Hope with a check for $40,500 at their annual fundraising gala to assist in their crusade to support battered woman and children. Giving to community non-profits will remain at the heart of what they do as an agency.

 

 

 

 

About The PM Group: The PM Group was founded in 1988. For over 33 years, the agency has continued to grow and is San Antonio’s largest marketing and advertising agency. The PM Group’s client roster spans numerous industries including home services, automotive, CPG, entertainment and sports marketing, legal, business services, non-profits, real estate and fitness. For two consecutive years now, the Agency has set annual revenue records with the addition of six new clients and through the continued success of our existing clients. Additionally, the agency hosts their annual Charity Gala that to date has raised millions of dollars for local San Antonio area non-profit organizations in the last 15 years! In 2020 alone, the Agency donated over $1,050,000 to local non-profits. It is our way of giving back to the community that we so humbly serve.
